name: PaintColor
summary: Contains enumerated constant values to represent logical colors associated with elements of the user interface.

enum_values.name: NormalStart
enum_values.summary: Gradient start for active toolbar tab and non-client area of Rhino.

enum_values.name: NormalEnd
enum_values.summary: Gradient end for active toolbar tab and non-client area of Rhino.

enum_values.name: NormalBorder
enum_values.summary: Edge color used for grippers, toolbar border, resize bars, status bar pane borders.

enum_values.name: HotStart
enum_values.summary: Gradient start for inactive toolbar tab.

enum_values.name: HotEnd
enum_values.summary: Gradient end for inactive toolbar tab.

enum_values.name: TextEnabled
enum_values.summary: Toolbar tab text and status bar text.

enum_values.name: ModifiedValueControlColor
enum_values.summary: Modified property value label text color

enum_values.name: EditBoxBackground
enum_values.summary: Background fill for input elements (edit box, checkbox)

enum_values.name: GridLinesOnPanelBackground
enum_values.summary: Grid lines on panel background color

enum_values.name: GridLinesOnEditBoxBackground
enum_values.summary: Grid lines on edit box background color
